commands.review_summary:
The branch adds region-specific z.ai dashboard URLs, routes the status-menu dashboard action through the selected z.ai API region, updates provider metadata/docs/changelog, and covers both targets in tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a feature PR rather than a standalone bug report. Source inspection shows current main routes z.ai dashboard clicks through global metadata only, and the PR adds focused assertions for both configured regions.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed; this PR has no discrete automated blocker after review.

target.title: feat: add dashboard url handling for z.ai api regions
target.body:
## Summary

- Route z.ai's Usage Dashboard action by the configured API region.
- Use the canonical global Coding Plan page and the direct BigModel China usage page.
- Keep provider metadata aligned with the global canonical URL.
- Document both dashboard targets.

## URLs verified

- Global: `https://z.ai/manage-apikey/coding-plan/personal/my-plan` — HTTP 200.
- China: `https://bigmodel.cn/coding-plan/personal/usage` — HTTP 200.
- The old global `/manage-apikey/subscription` path currently redirects to the canonical global URL above.

## Proof

- `swift test --filter ZaiAPIRegionTests`: 5 tests passed.
- `swift test --filter StatusMenuTests`: 139 tests passed.
- `make check`: passed; SwiftLint found 0 violations in 1,144 files.
- Maintainer-addition autoreview: clean, confidence 0.88.
- Full branch autoreview: clean, confidence 0.82.
- `git diff --check`: passed.

## Review

- Rebased onto current `main`.
- Added contributor changelog credit.
- Canonicalized the global URL rather than retaining a redirecting alias.
target.author: renbaoshuo
